room.caption: [BTB_HUB] ?????

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Welcome to Bubble Tower Side B, where things and ideas that aren't/can't be in the main game are placed. To return here from any door, use the menu teleport feature. These are silly things for casual enjoyment." signSize=3
stringToShow="Fight Four Warmasters simultaneously, but each has reduced HP and is fixed on a single form." signSize=2
stringToShow="Using a split room in the Warship, Jerry and Claire must each battle their own Warmaster while contending with the room's trap." signSize=2

stringToShow="These were coded to work on any angle, but were never utilized as such except a couple times in Gate 3. The... thing in here was going to show up one time during the game, but never did." signSize=3
bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=160 newMapY=288 toRoom=rBT_ZephyrA if global.BTB_ZephSecret=0 {instance_destroy()}
bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=160 newMapY=288 toRoom=rWarshipZ_E3 if global.bossGalleryTime[64]=99999 {instance_destroy()}
stringToShow="What extra lies beyond this door? Is it a new boss, a new level? Is it DT4? You'll just have to find out." signSize=2
